title: Weaver's Cosplay
description: A standalone side-mod to Weavers Cosmetics with cosplay outfits from other franchises
body:
![Banner image, showing the mod logo with 5 players behind it wearing various Mario, Zelda and Pokemon themed outfits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7VeATwgo/images/c449dedcc82ca605ba3b7eede1e6536517d769b4.png)

**Summary**

Weaver's Cosmetics: Cosplay is a Neoforge mod for Minecraft 1.21.1 that adds in unique cosmetic outfits to the game with designs inspired by the characters from Pokemon, The Legend of Zelda, and other games. They are designed to be used as a server resource and aren't available in Survival mode (though server hosts could use other mods to make them available to players, as we do). The mod is designed to be used alongside mods that allow layered cosmetic armours.



**Dependencies**

Geckolib

**Items Added**

- Pokemon Trainer Hats in Five colours that can be worn backwards by putting them in crafting grid
- Team Rocket Hat (also reversible)
- 12 different style Pokeball Belts
- Pokemaniac Hats for Pikachu, Gengar, Greninja, Magikarp, Wooper and Paldean Wooper (all with Shiny variants too)
- Mario Bros caps (Mario, Luigi, Wario and Waluigi)
- Link's Tunic sets (Cap with Animated Navi, Torso, Legs and Boots) for his Kokiri, Goron, Zora and Dark sets
- Link's Champion's Tunic (Torso and Legs)
- 


**Future Plans**

Mario Kart cosmetics (eg, Racing helmets, Bowser Shell Backpack, Yoshi hat)
More Pokemon Trainer items (incl. more feminine hats, other Teams gear, etc)
Majoras Mask, Keaton Mask, etc from Zelda



**Weaver's Cosmetics: Core**

Want more cosmetic outfits for your game or server? Check out my main mod: [Weaver's Cosmetics](https://modrinth.com/mod/weavers-cosmetics) for over 100 more original cosmetics!



**Modpacks & Mod Edits:**

I give permission to use the above described mod in any Curseforge or Modrinth modpacks that do not charge users for their use (though optional donations or Patreon, etc towards upkeep of modpack/server is acceptable). Please credit appropiately with at least a name, and link back to this page where/if possible.  If you would like to edit the mod, please contact me either by comment or by private message to discuss, as I don't give any permission to modify the above described mod unless you have asked directly, and even then permission is only granted on a case-by-case basis. If permission is granted, then you would need to inform your players of the changes and notify them that these are your own modifications and not mine.



**Notice of Non-Affiliation**
The included models and textures are inspired by the works of other licenses. The author, and modification "Weaver's Cosmetics: Cosplay" have no affiliation with any of the following:

Minecraft is a trademark of Mojang Synergies AB ｜ Pokémon is a trademark of Nintendo, Creatures Inc. and GAME FREAK inc. ｜ The Legend of Zelda and Super Mario Bros. are both trademarks of Nintendo of America Inc.
